title: gilia nigelliformis
intro: Gilia nigelliformis, also known as a species of the gilia genus, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Gilia nigelliformis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
